sections.heading: Goal
sections.text: Complete all five rows on the board. Each row must form a valid dice pattern - Straight (five in a row), Full House, Five of a Kind, and others.

sections.heading: Dice
sections.text: Click a die to select it. Double-click an unlocked die to reroll it. Adjacent unlocked dice can be swapped using your switch allowance.

sections.heading: Rows & powers
sections.text: When a row completes, those dice lock. Pattern powers (Make 5 of a Kind, Switch, Set Any Die) gain +1 charge when you complete a matching row - the x on the die shows how many uses you have. Switch Rows gives 1 charge per level. Passive powers are always on with no charges. Tap a power to activate it and follow the hint.

sections.heading: Levels & hearts
sections.text: Clear every row to finish the level. Pick a new power on level-up (up to three in your loadout). You have limited switches and rerolls each level. Run out of moves and you lose a heart - lose all hearts and the challenge run ends.

sections.heading: Challenge Orbs
sections.text: Each challenge orb on the map changes the rules - ordered rerolls, safari countdowns, tighter loadouts, and more. Hover an orb to read its rules. Earn that challenge orb's badge by beating level 8.

sections.heading: Dice Master Test
sections.text: Collect every challenge orb badge to unlock the portal. Enter the Dice Master Test to face three random games - win all three to become a Dice Master.
